title: Top 10 Best Party Schools in the US
body: ASU must have changed a lot since I was 18 and looking at colleges because that was ALWAYS considered the #1 party school in the nation.
author: @willvr4

title: Top 10 Best Party Schools in the US
body: I had the pleasure of attending California State University Chico.  The first time Playboy published a best party school was in 1987, and Chico topped the list.  There was an annual event called Pioneer Week, largely held in a mixture of venues from both One Mile and Five Mile parks, plus the greek houses and even retail, such as Madison Bear Garden.  It lasted the full week, making use of the weekends on both ends, and the closing weekend was an enormous blowout.  I use to work at a liquor store on The Esplanade, so I may have seen this from a different perspective than most students.  At the time, it was the best of both worlds.  It had the best computer school in the state, backed with the best national party vibe.  You could choose either extreme, or mix and match to fit your specific tastes, which most did.
author: @BDTrooper76

title: Top 10 Best Party Schools in the US
body: How do they have all this free time???? What about weekend assignments that basically eat your entire weekend? Or semester thesis? Or comprehensive portfolio reviews etc?

title: Colgate University Review - Colgate FAQs
body: Is there anything to do in Hamilton?  Depends on you.  Either there is nothing to do or lots to do.  Hiking, bicycling, lakes, rivers, lots of NY history.  In our day going to the dump with 22 rifles to shot rats even.  Look at he campus organizations.  It's not NYC however.
